title: Let Tom Hiddleston be your guide to Pompeii's final day
summary: But only one features actor Tom Hiddleston taking on the role of a “time detective” to bring the people of Pompeii to vivid life. That would be National Geographic’s new three-part docuseries, Pompeii: Out of Time .
